name: Cherries Jubilee
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup thawed COOL WHIP LITE Whipped Topping
2 Tablespoons toasted almonds, chopped and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour cold milk and 1/4 teaspoon of the extract into a large bowl.
2. Add pudding mix. Beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in whipped topping and 1 tablespoon of the chopped almonds.
4. Mix cherry pie filling and remaining 1/4 teaspoon extract.
5. Spoon pudding mixture and pie filling alternately into 8 dessert glasses.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Garnish with remaining almonds.
Makes 8 servings.
